highlights.description: AI Agent Ergonomics features for improved agent-browser interaction
Page inspection to discover interactive elements without prior knowledge
Selector validation with suggestions for alternatives
High-level workflow recipes for login and table extraction
Named state snapshots for saving and restoring browser state

added.description: `Pilot.Inspect()` method to discover buttons, links, inputs, selects, headings, and images on a page
`Pilot.ValidateSelectors()` and `Pilot.ValidateSelector()` methods to verify selectors before use
`Pilot.Login()` workflow for automated login with credentials and success verification
`Pilot.ExtractTable()` workflow to extract HTML table data to structured JSON
`state.Manager` for saving and loading named state snapshots to `~/.w3pilot/states/`
`page_inspect` MCP tool for AI agents to discover page elements
`test_validate_selectors` MCP tool for validating CSS selectors with suggestions
`workflow_login` MCP tool for automated login workflow
`workflow_extract_table` MCP tool for extracting table data
`state_save`, `state_load`, `state_list`, `state_delete` MCP tools for named state management
`w3pilot page inspect` CLI command for page inspection
`w3pilot test validate-selectors` CLI command for selector validation
`w3pilot state save/load/list/delete` CLI commands for state management
`--format` / `-o` global CLI flag for JSON output mode
`PageContext` struct added to error types for enhanced error context
`Suggestions` field added to `ElementNotFoundError` and `TimeoutError`

documentation.description: AI Agent Ergonomics guide with inspection, validation, workflows, and state management
v0.6.0 release notes
Updated MCP tools reference with new tools

highlights.description: Project renamed from vibium-go to w3pilot with new module path and CLI
Native Chrome launcher replaces external clicker dependency
Video recording and WebSocket monitoring support
Page event listeners and accessibility snapshot

breaking.description: CLI renamed from `vibium` to `w3pilot`, `vibium-mcp` to `w3pilot-mcp`, `vibium-rpa` to `w3pilot-rpa`
Environment variables renamed from `VIBIUM_*` to `W3PILOT_*` (DEBUG, HEADLESS, SKIP_BROWSER_DOWNLOAD)

added.description: Native Chrome launcher - browser is now bundled and auto-installed, removing need for external clicker binary
`Pilot.StartVideo()` and `Pilot.StopVideo()` for video recording of browser sessions
`Pilot.OnWebSocket()` for monitoring WebSocket connections opened by the page
Page event listeners: `OnConsole()`, `OnPageError()`, `OnRequest()`, `OnResponse()`, `OnDialog()`
Event listener infrastructure with `OnEvent()` method on BiDi client
`delete_cookie` MCP tool
`wait_for_text` MCP tool
`accessibility_snapshot` MCP tool
Frame selection MCP tools: `list_frames`, `select_frame`
State verification MCP tools: `get_state`, `verify_state`
Assertion MCP tools: `assert_text`, `assert_element`, `assert_url`, `assert_title`
Waiting MCP tools: `wait_for_element`, `wait_for_text`, `wait_for_url`
Low-priority SDK methods for parity with JS/Python clients

fixed.description: Writable file handle closed without error handling (code scanning alert)

tests.description: Integration tests for MCP tools and page methods

documentation.description: VibiumDev vs w3pilot feature comparison
Consolidated comparison documentation with Playwright MCP
Updated all documentation for w3pilot rename
Updated references from clicker to Chrome native launcher

infrastructure.description: Update CI/CD workflows for w3pilot rename
Update MCP server name from `vibium-mcp` to `w3pilot-mcp`

highlights.description: Semantic selectors for AI-native element finding by accessibility attributes
Full storage state management with sessionStorage support
Init scripts for pre-page JavaScript injection
25+ new MCP tools for dialogs, network, storage, tabs, and tracing

added.description: Semantic selectors: find elements by `role`, `text`, `label`, `placeholder`, `testid`, `alt`, `title`, `xpath`, and `near`
`Vibe.Find()` and `Vibe.FindAll()` now accept `FindOptions` for semantic filtering
`Element.Find()` and `Element.FindAll()` for scoped semantic search within parent elements
MCP tools (`click`, `type`, `fill`, `press`) support semantic selector parameters
`Vibe.AddInitScript()` to inject JavaScript before page scripts on every navigation
`add_init_script` MCP tool for runtime script injection
`--init-script` CLI flag for `vibium launch` and `vibium mcp` commands
`Vibe.StorageState()` now captures sessionStorage in addition to cookies and localStorage
`Vibe.SetStorageState()` restores complete browser state including sessionStorage
`Vibe.ClearStorage()` clears all storage types (cookies, localStorage, sessionStorage)
`clear_storage` MCP tool to clear all browser storage
MCP tracing tools: `start_trace`, `stop_trace`, `start_trace_chunk`, `stop_trace_chunk`, `start_trace_group`, `stop_trace_group`
MCP dialog tools: `handle_dialog`, `get_dialog`
MCP network tools: `get_network_requests`, `clear_network_requests`, `route`, `unroute`, `route_list`, `network_state_set`
MCP localStorage tools: `localstorage_get`, `localstorage_set`, `localstorage_list`, `localstorage_delete`, `localstorage_clear`
MCP sessionStorage tools: `sessionstorage_get`, `sessionstorage_set`, `sessionstorage_list`, `sessionstorage_delete`, `sessionstorage_clear`
MCP tab tools: `list_tabs`, `select_tab`, `close_tab`
MCP testing tools: `verify_value`, `verify_list_visible`, `generate_locator`, `fill_form`

fixed.description: Browser connection drops in MCP server by using `exec.Command` instead of `exec.CommandContext` for clicker process lifetime

tests.description: Integration tests for semantic selectors covering all selector types and scoped search
Integration tests for tracing with chunks and groups
Integration tests for storage state round-trip and sessionStorage
Integration tests for init scripts with API mocking

documentation.description: Semantic selectors section in README and SDK guide with examples
Init scripts, storage state, and tracing sections in README
MCP tools reference with all new tools documented
Feature comparison table with JS/Python clients

infrastructure.description: TASKS.md for tracking feature parity with JS/Python clients

highlights.description: Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) support for SSO login, CAPTCHA, and 2FA workflows

added.description: `pause_for_human` MCP tool to pause automation with visual overlay for human intervention
`set_storage_state` MCP tool to restore saved session (cookies + localStorage)

fixed.description: Handle file close errors in RPA file activity
Remove unreachable statement in vibium-mcp main

documentation.description: Add Human-in-the-Loop guide with workflow diagrams and examples
Update MCP server docs with HITL tools table
Update README shields

fixed.description: Update all Go imports from `agentplexus` to `plexusone` organization

infrastructure.description: Migrate CI/CD to organization-level reusable workflows from `plexusone/.github`
Update CHANGELOG, README, go.mod, and mkdocs.yml for plexusone organization

highlights.description: RPA workflow engine for YAML-based browser automation scripts
Code quality improvements and lint fixes

added.description: RPA workflow engine with YAML script execution, variable interpolation, and conditional logic
Activity registry with browser, element, form, and data activities
`vibium-rpa` CLI for running and validating RPA workflows

changed.description: Reduced duplication in MCP element handlers with `elementOp` helper function

fixed.description: Handle unchecked errors in RPA executor for browser cleanup and error handler steps
Tighten file permissions from 0644 to 0600 for security (gosec G306)
Fix gofmt formatting in RPA types

documentation.description: Add release notes for v0.2.0 and reorganize releases into `docs/releases/`
Update documentation for clicker availability and repo migration
Update README diagram

infrastructure.description: Make E2E tests manual until clicker binary is distributed
Suppress false positive lint warnings with nolint directives

highlights.description: Go client for Vibium browser automation platform with full feature parity with JavaScript and Python clients

added.description: Core types: `BoundingBox`, `ElementInfo`, `LaunchOptions`, `FindOptions`, `ActionOptions`
Custom error types: `ConnectionError`, `TimeoutError`, `ElementNotFoundError`, `BrowserCrashedError`, `BiDiError`
BiDi WebSocket client for browser communication
Clicker process management with binary discovery via `VIBIUM_CLICKER_PATH`, PATH, and cache directory
`Element` type with `Click()`, `Type()`, `Text()`, `GetAttribute()`, `BoundingBox()`, `Center()`, `WaitFor()` methods
`Vibe` browser control with `Launch()`, `Go()`, `Screenshot()`, `Find()`, `Evaluate()`, `Quit()` methods
Debug logging with `slog` via `VIBIUM_DEBUG` environment variable
Navigation methods: `Reload()`, `Back()`, `Forward()`, `WaitForNavigation()`
`FindAll()` method for finding multiple elements by CSS selector

changed.description: Environment variable renamed from `HEADLESS` to `VIBIUM_HEADLESS` for consistency

fixed.description: Format `bidi.go` with gofmt and tighten file permissions to 0600
`FindAll` parsing to handle BiDi array serialization by returning JSON from JavaScript
Relaxed test assertions for example.com content changes

tests.description: Example tests with testable examples for documentation
Integration tests for `example.com` with page title, element finding, screenshots, and JavaScript evaluation
Integration tests for `the-internet.herokuapp.com` with dynamic elements, inputs, checkboxes, dropdowns, and navigation

documentation.description: Package documentation with godoc comments
README with feature parity table, installation, quick start, and API reference
Documentation for debug logging, navigation methods, and `FindAll`
Testing section with unit and integration test instructions
Repository badges for build status, lint, Go Report Card, and license
